hero.title: POS Lite is all your business needs.
hero.subtitle: Simplify ordering and payments for your customers and your staff. No extra hardware, all you need is internet & phone or laptop.

features.title: Transform Your Restaurant
features.subtitle: Klopay.app offers an integrated platform to boost efficiency, enhance customer experience, and drive your business forward.

qrMenu.title: Interactive QR Menu
qrMenu.description: Give your customers a modern ordering experience with beautiful digital menus accessed via QR.

fastOrdering.title: Fast & Accurate Ordering
fastOrdering.description: Reduce errors and speed up service with intuitive digital ordering, whether from customers' phones or your waitstaff's devices.

growBusiness.title: Grow Your Business
growBusiness.description: Gain valuable insights into sales trends and customer preferences, helping you optimize your menu and marketing strategies.

workflow.title: Streamlined Workflow
workflow.description: Manage your entire restaurant, from inventory to payments, with a system designed for maximum operational efficiency.

realtime.title: Real-Time Communication
realtime.description: Ensure perfect coordination between front-of-house and kitchen with instant, reliable order transmission.

reimagined.title: Your Restaurant, Reimagined for the Digital Age.
reimagined.subtitle: Klopay.app offers an integrated platform to boost efficiency, enhance customer experience, and drive your business forward.

websiteBuilder.title: Build Your Restaurant's Online Presence.
websiteBuilder.subtitle: No need to hire expensive web designers. Klopay.app's intuitive website builder allows you to effortlessly create a professional online home for your restaurant. Select from predefined themes and sections, add your text, images, and colors to perfectly match your brand – all in minutes.

translations.title: Themes & Translations
translations.subtitle: Klopay.app ensures your restaurant's digital presence is accessible and appealing to everyone. Choose from a variety of stunning themes to perfectly brand your menu and website, then effortlessly reach a wider audience with built-in multi-language support.

statistics.title: Know Your Business Inside Out
statistics.subtitle: Get powerful analytics and insights to make data-driven decisions.
statistics.bestWaiterDesc: Track staff performance and reward your top performers.
statistics.mostSoldDesc: Identify your bestsellers and optimize your menu.
statistics.revenueDesc: Monitor daily, weekly, and monthly revenue trends.
statistics.realtimeDesc: See what's happening in your restaurant right now.

ai.title: AI-Powered Features
ai.subtitle: Let artificial intelligence help you create stunning menus and reach global audiences.
ai.translationDesc: Automatically translate your menu to any language with one click.
ai.imagesDesc: Generate beautiful food images for your menu items.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 3 months. No credit card required.

items.quote: Klopay transformed how we handle orders. Our customers love scanning QR codes and ordering directly from their phones!
items.author: Marko P.

items.quote: The analytics helped us identify our best-selling dishes. We increased revenue by 30% in just 2 months.
items.author: Ana S.

items.quote: Finally, a POS system that doesn't require expensive hardware. Setup took 15 minutes and we were live!
items.author: Stefan M.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Restaurant?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Klopay to streamline their operations.
